# Combine Orders

At Acme Shop, customers can combine two separate orders into a single shipment for convenience, provided the orders are placed within 12 hours and have not yet been processed for shipping. To initiate the combination process, customers should log into their account and use the "Order History" section to submit a request, which Acme Shop will review within 1-2 business days. While there are no extra fees for combining orders, standard shipping rates based on the total package weight and dimensions will apply. However, orders with perishable items or items on backorder might not be eligible for combination due to special handling requirements.

[Source: order_management.md#combine-orders]
